name: slim-customizable-cordova-browser
description: Slim, customizable Cordova browser shell with iBeacon scanning and background mode.

scripts.plugins:add: cordova plugin add cordova-plugin-ibeacon@3.8.1 cordova-plugin-background-mode-fixes cordova-plugin-intentshim cordova-plugin-android-permissions
scripts.prepare:android: npm run setup && npm run platform:add:android && npm run plugins:add
scripts.build:android: npm run setup && cordova build android && npm run pack-client
scripts.build:android:release: npm run setup && cordova build android --release && npm run pack-client
scripts.run:android: npm run setup && cordova run android
scripts.clean: rimraf platforms plugins dist www/cordova.js www/cordova_plugins.js www/plugins www/cordova-js-src
